title: wowaddon.yml
description: Project configuration for a World of Warcraft addon repository.

name.description: The addon name. The source lives at src/<name>, and the TOC and shipped folder share it.

curseforge-project-id.description: The numeric CurseForge project id that publish uploads to.

curseforge-project-slug.description: Optional CurseForge project slug (the addon's url segment). Lets publish print the public file page for an upload.

changelog-url.description: Optional link to the changelog. Publish uses it as the release notes rather than inlining anything.

dev-only.description: Paths, relative to the source dir, that exist for development and never ship (glob patterns allowed). They are left out of the build, and any TOC line referencing one is stripped from the built TOC.

libs.description: Embedded libraries to fetch into the addon's Libs dir, mapping a folder name to an svn url.

version.description: How ./dev bump-calver reads and writes the version. The version is the single source of truth in this one file.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the file holding the version (the TOC).

pattern.description: Regex locating the version, via a `version` named group or its first group.

format.description: Calver template. Tokens: {YYYY} (ISO week-year), {0W} (zero-padded ISO week), {N} (0-based serial).
